cases.title: TS-35: Instructor dashboard Present count updates within 5 seconds after successful check-in without reload
preconditions: Active session with 10 enrolled students; 3 already Present, 7 Pending
Authenticated Instructor assigned to session with attendance:read (session scope)
Should-capability FR-15 enabled in test environment
Student A enrolled with valid QR token and coordinates within session radius
Wall-clock or high-resolution timer available for elapsed-time measurement
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Instructor session and record summary.present baseline (3)
Record T0 at moment POST /api/v1/check-in returns HTTP 200 outcome Success for Student A
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance every 500 ms until summary.present === 4 or 5-second timeout elapses
Record T1 at first poll response where summary.present incremented to 4
Assert summary.pending decremented by 1
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 5000 ms per NFR-08 target
Assert no manual page reload or cache-bypass header required between T0 and T1
cases.expected: Testing-plan §3 TS-35 satisfied: delay between successful check-in and updated Present count on instructor dashboard ≤ 5 seconds without manual reload per NFR-08 and AC-15a

cases.title: AttendanceService.getSessionRoster reflects check-in immediately so poll source meets refresh SLA
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database with Active session and Pending attendance rows
AttendanceService wired per attendance module with session and enrollment read models
CheckInTransaction completes atomically per domain model §5.2
Baseline summary: present=2, pending=8 for 10 enrolled students
steps: Invoke AttendanceService.getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) and capture summary.present
Execute successful check-in transaction for one Pending student (Present outcome, token consumed)
Immediately invoke getSessionRoster(sessionId, instructorId) after commit (no artificial delay)
Assert summary.present increased by 1 and summary.pending decreased by 1
Assert records array includes updated student row with status Present and checkedInAt populated
Assert data-layer latency from commit to updated roster query is negligible (< 100 ms) so 5 s poll budget is achievable
cases.expected: Module-integration boundary: poll source returns updated Present count immediately after check-in commit; server-side data ready within NFR-08 5-second UI refresh window per API design §7.1

cases.title: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance returns HTTP 200 with updated summary within 5 s poll cycle after check-in
preconditions: Active session with mixed Present and Pending students
Authenticated assigned Instructor session with attendance:read
Student A with valid token ready to check in
API polling interval documented as 5 seconds per API design §11
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance and record summary.present baseline
POST /api/v1/check-in for Student A; assert HTTP 200 outcome Success
Within 5 seconds, send GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance with Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 200 OK and Content-Type application/json
Assert response summary.present === baseline + 1
Assert response body contains sessionId, summary object with enrolled/present/pending fields, and records array per API design §7.1
Assert no errorCode in success envelope
cases.expected: HTTP 200 contract for live monitor poll delivers updated Present count within NFR-08 5-second refresh budget per API design §7.1 and §11

cases.title: Instructor Theo dõi tab StatCards refresh within 5 seconds after student check-in without page reload
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on desktop viewport at /sessions/:sessionId with Active session defaulting to Theo dõi tab per layout §11
Active session with SessionMonitorDashboard polling every 5 seconds per API design §11
Should-capability FR-15 enabled; baseline StatCard Đã điểm danh shows 3 of 10 enrolled
Student A can complete check-in in parallel browser context or via API trigger
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:sessionId and select Theo dõi tab
Verify StatCard Đã điểm danh displays count 3 matching initial API poll
Record T0 when Student A check-in succeeds (API 200 or mobile confirmation visible)
Wait up to 5 seconds without manual page reload, refresh button, or F5
Record T1 when StatCard Đã điểm danh updates to 4
Verify roster grid row for Student A shows Present StatusBadge
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 5000 ms per NFR-08
cases.expected: NFR-08 browser verification: instructor dashboard Present vs enrolled StatCards update within 5 seconds without manual reload per AC-15a and 07-non-functional-risk §2.2

cases.title: Student denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance with 403 — no live dashboard data exposed
preconditions: Authenticated Student A session (no attendance:read session roster per roles-permissions §2.2)
Active session with attendance records including peer students
Known sessionId for that Active session
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Student A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden
Assert response message Bạn không có quyền thực hiện thao tác này per roles-permissions §2.5
Assert response body contains no summary.present, summary.enrolled, or records roster data
cases.expected: Live dashboard poll endpoint restricted to instructor scope; students cannot observe cohort refresh metrics per RBAC matrix

cases.title: NFR-08 gate fails when dashboard count update delay exceeds 5000 ms boundary
preconditions: Active session with Should-capability FR-15 enabled
Authenticated Instructor polling GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance
Student A ready to check in with valid token
Test harness records elapsed time from check-in success to first updated summary.present
steps: Record T0 at POST /api/v1/check-in HTTP 200 Success for Student A
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance every 500 ms for up to 6 seconds
If summary.present does not increment within 5000 ms, mark test FAIL for NFR-08
If summary.present increments at T1 where T1 minus T0 ≤ 5000 ms, mark test PASS
Document measured delay in test report for pilot APM baseline comparison
cases.expected: NFR-08 pass/fail boundary enforced at 5000 ms delay between check-in success and updated Present count on instructor dashboard per 07-non-functional-risk §2.2 verification method

cases.title: Five parallel check-ins from distinct students produce correct summary for next dashboard poll within SLA
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session and 20 Pending students
5 distinct students with valid QR tokens and in-radius coordinates
AttendanceService.getSessionRoster callable after concurrent check-in submissions
Instructor poll simulates GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance after all commits
steps: Record baseline summary.present and summary.pending via getSessionRoster
Record T0 before launching 5 parallel successful check-in transactions for distinct Pending students
Await all 5 check-ins to return Success outcome
Invoke getSessionRoster immediately after last commit completes
Assert summary.present === baseline.present + 5 and summary.pending === baseline.pending - 5
Assert elapsed time from T0 to updated roster query ≤ 5000 ms including transaction completion
cases.expected: Concurrent check-ins during Active session propagate to live summary counts atomically; dashboard poll source reflects all increments within NFR-08 refresh window

cases.title: Flow A step 5: instructor attendance poll reflects check-in within 5 seconds of student success
preconditions: Flow A completed through step 4: roster seeded, session created with GPS, opened Active, valid QR token obtained
Student logged in with valid coordinates within radius
Authenticated Instructor session cookie; Should-capability FR-15 enabled
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance before check-in and record summary.present baseline
Record T0 at POST /api/v1/check-in HTTP 200 outcome Success
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance until summary.present === baseline + 1 or 5-second timeout
Assert records array contains student row with status Present and checkedInAt timestamp
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 5000 ms per NFR-08
Confirm Flow A step 5 per testing-plan §6 includes live monitor refresh timing
cases.expected: Flow A lifecycle instructor live attendance poll reflects successful check-in within NFR-08 5-second near-real-time SLA per testing-plan §6 step 5

cases.title: SessionMonitorDashboard auto-polls every 5 seconds without instructor manual refresh action
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId Theo dõi tab
Active session with SessionMonitorDashboard mounted
Network log or Playwright request interception for GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance
Should-capability FR-15 enabled
steps: Navigate to Theo dõi tab and wait for initial attendance poll to complete
Record timestamps of consecutive GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance requests over 15 seconds
Assert poll interval is approximately 5 seconds (4–6 s tolerance) per API design §11
Verify no manual refresh button click or full page reload occurs between polls
Assert polling status bar displays Cập nhật lúc HH:mm:ss after each successful poll per layout §12
Close session via instructor action; assert attendance polls cease and status bar no longer updates
cases.expected: UI polling cadence aligns with 5-second server poll interval and layout §12 live-region chrome; polls stop when session is no longer Active so NFR-08 refresh target applies only during live monitor window per API design §11

cases.title: Pending to Present transition updates summary counts visible to next roster poll query
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session; one student attendance_record in Pending state
AttendanceService.getSessionRoster and check-in pipeline share transactional consistency
Summary before transition: present=N, pending=M
steps: Query getSessionRoster and assert target student status Pending in records array
Execute check-in state transition Pending → Present for target student
Invoke getSessionRoster immediately after commit (simulating next instructor poll)
Assert summary.present === N + 1 and summary.pending === M - 1
Assert target record afterState Present with checkedInAt set
Assert enrolled total unchanged so dashboard ratio Present vs enrolled is accurate for NFR-08 measurement
cases.expected: State transition from Pending to Present reflected in live summary counts on first poll after commit, enabling NFR-08 ≤ 5 s dashboard refresh

cases.title: Three sequential check-ins each propagate to dashboard counts within 5 seconds under normal load
preconditions: Active session with 20 Pending students
Authenticated Instructor polling GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance
Should-capability FR-15 enabled
Three distinct students with valid tokens and in-radius coordinates
steps: Record initial summary.present baseline
For each of 3 students at ~2-second intervals: POST /check-in Success, then poll attendance until present count increments or 5-second timeout
Assert each individual check-in produces dashboard count update within 5000 ms
Assert final summary.present === baseline + 3 and summary.pending === initial pending - 3
Assert no manual page reload required between sequential updates
cases.expected: NFR-08 sustained under staggered check-ins: each successful check-in propagates to live Present vs enrolled counts within 5 seconds without reload during normal pilot load

cases.title: Unassigned instructor denied live attendance poll with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Instructor B authenticated but not assigned to session class-subject and not session creator
Active session with live attendance data in unassigned scope
Instructor B lacks attendance:read for requested session per BR-08
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance using Instructor B session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert errorCode Forbidden or ReportAccessDenied
Assert response contains no summary.present or live roster data
Verify assigned Instructor A can poll same endpoint with HTTP 200 and receive refreshable summary
cases.expected: Cross-instructor live dashboard poll denied; NFR-08 refresh SLA applies only to authorized instructor monitor per class-subject assignment scope

cases.title: Dashboard preserves poll state and refreshes counts after transient API error without full reload
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId Theo dõi tab
Active session with baseline StatCard counts visible
Ability to simulate one failed attendance poll followed by recovery (mock 503 or network blip)
Student A ready to check in after poll recovery
steps: Navigate to Theo dõi tab and verify initial StatCard counts from successful poll
Simulate one GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance failure; verify toast per error-handling §7 and status bar Không thể cập nhật — thử lại per layout §12
Click retry or wait for automatic poll resume without instructor manual page reload
Trigger successful check-in for Student A
Assert StatCard Đã điểm danh updates within 5 seconds of check-in on next successful poll cycle
Assert URL unchanged and no full document navigation occurred
cases.expected: NFR-08 refresh holds after transient poll failure: instructor dashboard recovers polling and updates counts within 5 seconds without manual reload per error-handling §7

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance for Closed session returns stale final counts — no live refresh expected
preconditions: Session transitioned from Active to Closed with final attendance tallies
Authenticated assigned Instructor session
Student attempts check-in after close (SessionNotActive)
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for Closed session and record summary.present
Attempt POST /api/v1/check-in for enrolled student; assert HTTP 403 SessionNotActive
Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for 10 seconds
Assert summary.present unchanged from pre-check-in baseline
Assert NFR-08 refresh SLA does not apply outside Active session window
cases.expected: NFR-08 near-real-time refresh applies only during Active session; Closed session poll returns static final counts with no post-close increment boundary per BR-01

cases.title: Instructor Theo dõi monitor layout omits /admin nav links and permission-gated SidebarNav items
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor with session:read and attendance:read for assigned Active session
Instructor on /sessions/:sessionId Theo dõi tab with SessionMonitorDashboard mounted
Instructor lacks all admin permissions (user:read all, roster:write, report:export, policy:write)
steps: Navigate to /sessions/:sessionId and confirm Theo dõi tab is active for Active session
Query SidebarNav and full layout DOM for anchor elements with href matching /admin
Assert zero /admin/* navigation links anywhere in layout chrome per BR-14 and roles-permissions §2.3a
Assert SidebarNav renders only Buổi học and Báo cáo items when instructor holds session:read and report:read; admin-only items omitted from DOM not disabled
Assert BottomNav is absent in InstructorLayout (desktop shell) and student-only routes are not shown
cases.expected: Tag-specific browser-journey hint satisfied: instructor live monitor context exposes no forbidden admin route prefixes; SidebarNav omits items lacking required permission so NFR-08 dashboard testing occurs within correctly scoped instructor chrome
